{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032016563572F2A796D6562AF5EF5D"}"},"total":655},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7489328812000641854","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"讲述清晰，内容丰富有趣，语言灵动，能激发读者阅读兴趣。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743753367,"group_id":"7469756548235938840","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"随机更新无定期更新。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7S50y02ecUk0PjmQ/qkrOQ=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e569133b589f4e25be744cb6da14db9c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531076&x-signature=5I%2BjzaMvjChbNm3%2BaiP%2BnxMfc5s%3D","user_id":"618395811456920","user_name":"金光神雷"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"618395811456920","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7469756548235938840","book_info":{"abstract":"李鸿获得了放映提问历史视频的系统。
在抽到的历史片段上，播放历史视频，提问历史问题。
正在金陵抵抗的士兵们，在看到了倭国会进行金陵大屠杀后，纷纷开始了拼死的抵抗。
二战前，众多的发国民众在看到本国居然被得国轻易击败的信息，一个个都不可置信的倒在了地上。
而美术生看到了自己击败发国，血洗耻辱的那段信息后，也是异常的兴奋。
在洪武年间。
朱元璋看着面前的第一个问题，秦始皇死后第几年，都城咸阳被攻破。
看着选项上那一个个短暂的时间。
信心十足的写上了答案。
并且在心里狠狠的嘲讽了一下秦始皇。
但是面对第二个问题，明太祖朱元璋死后第几年，都城金陵被攻破的问题。
看着那和第一个问题一样短暂没有变过的选项。
直接愣在了原地。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ce8e665c030c79395c1f2572e686a0d2","author":"一个土豆片子","author_id":"","book_id":"7469756548235938840","book_name":"天幕，在上世纪，放映近现代历史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#607080","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7469773405558948414","read_count":"56216","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1433422"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"691","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4b4d85fe330083b086ec953af20427ac~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180995&x-signature=Q9F6kT4Yd%2FUG5kQu9NsNoYbIDhk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4119234370875599","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1446"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032016563572F2A796D6562AF5EF5D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读105小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":253863,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":379365,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":4713},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"749799899453764482
